data.title: First Point
data.body: Explain the first key feature or takeaway. Keep it concise and impactful.

data.title: Second Point
data.body: Describe the second important aspect. Focus on what matters most to your audience.

data.title: Third Point
data.body: Conclude with a strong third point. This is often the most memorable.

data.alt: Supporting visual for the three points
data.caption: A diagram, screenshot, or photo
